hook: I spent $47 and my couch looks brand new.

aida_breakdown.attention: Creator stands next to a stained, pet-hair-covered sectional holding the $47 cover box with a defeated shrug — price overlaid bold on screen.
aida_breakdown.interest: Extreme close-ups of embedded dog hair and deep stains; creator admits she was draping throw blankets over it before any guest arrived.
aida_breakdown.desire: Fast-motion of stretch cover going on the sectional in under 10 minutes, ending on a wide reveal of a crisp, fitted sofa with zero pet hair visible.
aida_breakdown.action: Creator faces camera, taps phone showing Instagram bio, points directly at lens.

value_equation.dream_outcome: Sectional looks like a $1,200 showroom sofa with zero visible pet hair or stains.
value_equation.perceived_likelihood: $47 price shown on screen plus live before-and-after in the same video — no external claims needed.
value_equation.effort_sacrifice: No tools, no landlord permission, no sewing — stretch-and-fit only.

scenes.visual_prompt: Wide shot of a badly stained sectional sofa covered in dog hair. Creator stands beside it, arms crossed, looking directly at camera with a resigned expression. Amazon box on the floor. Bold '$47 FIXED THIS COUCH' overlaid in white text.
scenes.voiceover: My couch was embarrassing me in front of guests.

scenes.visual_prompt: Extreme close-up of cushion surface showing deep brown stains and thick clumps of dog fur matted into the fabric. Slow deliberate pan across the damage. Dim, unflattering light.
scenes.voiceover: I was hiding it with throw blankets for two years.

scenes.visual_prompt: Creator holding up the Mamma Mia cover packaging with a skeptical raised eyebrow. Price tag clearly visible. She mouths 'forty-seven dollars?' at the camera.
scenes.voiceover: I was skeptical. Forty-seven dollars felt too cheap.

scenes.visual_prompt: Overhead fast-motion shot of hands stretching the grey fabric cover over sofa cushions. Material hugs each section tightly. No wrinkles. Clean, satisfying fit.
scenes.voiceover: It went on in ten minutes. No tools, no struggle.

scenes.visual_prompt: Wide reveal shot of the fully covered sectional — crisp, smooth, perfectly fitted. Bright natural light. A dog sits on it but zero pet hair is visible. Creator stands to the side looking genuinely surprised.
scenes.voiceover: I was wrong. It looks like a brand-new sofa.

scenes.visual_prompt: Creator looks into camera, taps phone screen showing her Instagram bio page. Friendly, casual smile. Clean bright background.
scenes.voiceover: Everything is linked in my bio.

caption:
I spent $47 and my destroyed sectional looks like a showroom sofa.

My dog had basically claimed the couch. Stains, fur, the works. I was throwing blankets over it every time someone came over.

I tried the Mamma Mia waterproof stretch cover because it was $47 and I had nothing to lose. Ten minutes later I was standing there genuinely confused about why I waited so long.

Waterproof. Fits sectionals. Machine washable. Zero pet hair showing.

Link in bio — it's the first one listed.

affiliate_strategy.primary_product: Mamma Mia Waterproof Stretch Sofa Cover
